data.content: Approved in implementation review: commit 84e47100afc2 wires a shared active-ancestor helper into the Knots, Beads, and bd in_action filters so active beats keep their parent chains without reintroducing descendant expansion or terminal sibling leakage. Revalidated with bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and bun run lint (warnings only).
